resources.string:
Salah Times does not collect personal data. All prayer-time calculations run locally on your device. 

This app shows ads via Google AdMob. Google and its advertising partners may collect and process anonymous data in line with their policies for ad personalization. 

Google Privacy Policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy 

You can manage ad preferences in your device settings (Google → Ads). 

Local preferences stored by this app (ad frequency state) never leave your device. 

Contact: crowja@live.com
